title: ContactPresence Unknown catch-all + #[non_exhaustive] combination is correct and should be preserved
description: ContactPresence uses both #[non_exhaustive] (prevents exhaustive match in Rust code, forcing _ arms) AND #[serde(other)] Unknown (handles unknown wire values gracefully). Both are needed and serve different purposes. A future contributor might suggest removing one as redundant — they are not: #[non_exhaustive] is for compile-time safety; #[serde(other)] is for runtime parse safety. The other enums should be updated to match this pattern.
